svg.title: SEAL UC Diagram — Scoring, Ranking and RBL detail
svg.desc: Detailed use case diagram showing include and extend relationships among scoring, ranking, promotion, disqualification, calibration, variance dashboard, anonymized export, audit log, notifications, and prizes. Judges score per criterion; ranking includes promotion computation; disqualification and scoring both include audit log writes; calibration extends scoring; export and variance dashboard depend on per-criterion score storage; publish results includes notifications and extends to prizes.
svg.text: UC18 stores per-judge per-criterion scores — required by RQ1–RQ3.
UC15 logs every scoring & disqualification action for transparency.
